context: Tests whether the agent implements all three commission types correctly, enforces the 30-day return window hold, triggers earning recording from the right Stripe event, caps commission on shipping, and logs calculation inputs alongside results.

checklist.name: Percentage commission formula
checklist.description: Percentage commission is calculated as Math.round(grossAmountCents * (rate / 100)) — uses Math.round and divides rate by 100

checklist.name: Fixed commission in cents
checklist.description: Fixed commission is calculated as commission_rate * 100 (converting dollars to cents), not just commission_rate

checklist.name: Tiered commission boundaries
checklist.description: Tiered commission uses three tiers: 20% on first $1,000 (100000 cents), 15% on $1,000-$10,000, 10% above $10,000

checklist.name: Tiered cumulative calculation
checklist.description: Tiered commission applies each rate only to the portion of gross amount within that tier (cumulative/bracket-style), not a flat rate on the whole amount

checklist.name: Shipping excluded from gross
checklist.description: The gross_amount passed to commission calculation is the item amount only (itemAmountCents), NOT including shippingAmountCents

checklist.name: 30-day availability hold
checklist.description: available_at is set to 30 days in the future from the current date (using setDate(getDate() + 30) or equivalent)

checklist.name: Initial status is held
checklist.description: New seller_earnings records are inserted with status 'held' (not 'pending' or 'available')

checklist.name: payment_intent.succeeded trigger
checklist.description: The webhook handler calls recordSellerEarning only for 'payment_intent.succeeded' events, NOT for checkout.session.completed or other earlier events

checklist.name: Commission inputs logged
checklist.description: The earning record stores the commission_type and commission_rate (the inputs) alongside the computed commission amount

checklist.name: Atomic transaction
checklist.description: recordSellerEarning wraps the earning insert inside a database transaction (using db.transaction or equivalent)

checklist.name: Net amount derived correctly
checklist.description: net_amount is stored as gross_amount minus commission (not gross including shipping)
